hooks.command:
_HP=$(printenv PATH 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -z "$_HP" ] && [ -n "${SHELL:-}" ]; then _HP=$("$SHELL" -lc 'printf %s "$PATH"' 2>/dev/null || true); fi; _HP=$(printf '%s' "$_HP" | tr ' ' ':'); export PATH="${_HP:+$_HP:}$PATH";  _C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; _E="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; _P=$({ [ -n "$_E" ] && printf '%s
' "$_E"; ls -dt "$_C/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null; printf '%s
' "$_C/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; } | while IFS= read -r _R; do _R="${_R%/}"; [ -d "$_R/plugin/scripts" ] && _Q="$_R/plugin" || _Q="$_R"; [ -f "$_Q/scripts/version-check.js" ] && { printf '%s
' "$_Q"; break; }; done); [ -n "$_P" ] || { echo "claude-mem: version-check.js not found" >&2; exit 1; }; command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1 && { _W=$(cygpath -w "$_P" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$_W" ] && _P="$_W"; }; CLAUDE_MEM_CODEX_HOOK=1 node "$_P/scripts/version-check.js"
